ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN, Transformer) */,
  "training_params" TEXT /* Training parameters used for the model (e.g., batch size, learning rate) */,
  "training_dataset" TEXT /* Dataset used for training the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "train_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* Final training loss */,
  "train_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy */,
  "train_f1_score" REAL /* Training F1-score */,
  "train_precision" REAL /* Training precision */,
  "train_recall" REAL /* Training recall */,
  "train_rocauc" REAL /* Training ROCAUC */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Detailed hyperparameters used for training (e.g., optimizer, regularization techniques) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model on the dataset */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the dataset */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the dataset */,
  "ROCAUC" REAL /* ROCAUC of the model on the dataset */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was last updated */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the evaluation process */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* Final test loss */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Test accuracy */,
  "test_f1_score" REAL /* Test F1-score */,
  "test_precision" REAL /* Test precision */,
  "test_recall" REAL /* Test recall */,
  "test_rocauc" REAL /* Test ROCAUC */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., website, publication) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in MB or GB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, TXT) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) of the dataset */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of NLP task the dataset is suitable for (e.g., sentiment analysis, text classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
